tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators

policies.detail: No refunds after 7 days of purchase. Refund requests within 7 days are processed within 3-5 business days.
24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support with 24-48 hour response time.
All plans are billed monthly. Annual billing with a 20% discount is available on request.
You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing period.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook content creators.

faq.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The price difference is prorated for the remaining billing period.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM formats for input and output.
